# Prepare the FileUpload feature branch for a merge into dev

we need to:
- remove the cors dependency
- move the app.js file into the example
- rename the file into `server.mjs`
- add a `README.md` into the new example => how to run it
- close the draft PR
- add & merge a new PR

@ExtAnimal
